name: Fiction
description: Literary works of imagination, including novels, short stories, and novellas that explore human experiences and emotions.

name: Mystery
description: Stories centered around solving a puzzle, crime, or unexplained event, keeping readers engaged with suspense and intrigue.

name: Science Fiction
description: Speculative fiction exploring futuristic concepts, advanced technology, space exploration, and alternative realities.

name: Business
description: Books focused on entrepreneurship, management, finance, and professional development for career advancement.

name: Self-Help
description: Personal development books offering guidance, strategies, and insights for improving various aspects of life.

name: Cookbook
description: Collections of recipes, cooking techniques, and culinary knowledge for home cooks and professional chefs.

name: Biography
description: Non-fiction works chronicling the lives and achievements of notable individuals throughout history.

name: History
description: Scholarly and popular works examining past events, cultures, and civilizations to understand human development.

name: Romance
description: Stories focused on romantic relationships and emotional connections between characters.

name: Thriller
description: Fast-paced narratives filled with tension, danger, and high-stakes situations that keep readers engaged.

name: Fantasy
description: Imaginative stories featuring magical elements, mythical creatures, and fantastical worlds beyond reality.

name: Horror
description: Tales designed to evoke fear, dread, and unease through supernatural or psychological elements.

name: Poetry
description: Literary works expressing emotions, ideas, and experiences through verse, rhythm, and imagery.

name: Philosophy
description: Explorations of fundamental questions about existence, knowledge, values, reason, and reality.

name: Education
description: Textbooks, guides, and resources designed to facilitate learning and knowledge acquisition.
